prompt_template: Translate to {target_lang}. CRITICAL: If text has ANY quotes or special characters around words - keep EXACT SAME characters, do NOT replace them! Example: "Widgets" -> "Vidzhety" (same " quotes), NOT «Vidzhety». DANGEROUS characters: U+0027 APOSTROPHE, U+0022 QUOTATION MARK, U+201C U+201D. RULES: 1) Original has quotes/symbols = translation must have IDENTICAL quotes/symbols in same positions. 2) For NEW apostrophes in words (l'homme, im'ya, l'ora) use U+2019. 3) For NEW quotes use: U+00AB U+00BB or U+201E U+201D. 4) Preserve: %s %d {{var}} {var} \n spaces. Return: [{"id": N, "translation": "..."}]. Input: {json_input}
